---
title: "Contact"
---

```{=html}
<!-- Contact Hero -->
<div class="contact-section" style="margin-top: -56px; padding-top: 56px;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-title-wrapper">
      <span class="section-badge" style="border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2); color: var(--color-gold-light); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);">Contact Us</span>
      <h2 style="color: #ffffff !important;">Get in Touch</h2>
      <div class="gold-line"></div>
      <p style="color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.8;">
        Interested in collaborating, joining our lab, or learning more about
        our research? We would love to hear from you.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-4 justify-content-center" style="max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto;">
     <!-- Email -->
     <div class="col-md-4">
  <div class="contact-card">
    <div class="contact-icon"><img src="images/contact.png" alt="Email" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain;"></div>
    <div class="contact-title">Email</div>
    <div class="contact-text">
      Email contact coming soon.
      <br /><br />
      <span style="color: var(--color-gold); font-weight: 500;">Stay tuned →</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>


      <!-- Location -->
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="contact-card">
          <div class="contact-icon"><img src="images/location.png" alt="Location" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain;"></div>
          <div class="contact-title">Location</div>
          <div class="contact-text">
            School of Statistics & Actuarial Science<br />
            University of the Witwatersrand<br />
            Johannesburg, South Africa
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Connect -->
      <div class="col-md-4">
  <div class="contact-card">
    <div class="contact-icon"><img src="images/connect.png" alt="Connect" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain;"></div>
    <div class="contact-title">Connect</div>
    <div class="contact-text">
      LinkedIn page coming soon.
      <br /><br />
      <span style="color: var(--color-gold); font-weight: 500;">Stay tuned →</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
      
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Additional Info -->
<div style="padding: 5rem 0; background: white;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="section-title-wrapper">
      <span class="section-badge badge-navy">Information</span>
      <h2>Useful Links</h2>
      <div class="gold-line"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="row g-4 justify-content-center" style="max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto;">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="partner-card">
          <img src="images/wits.jpg" alt="WITS" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
          <div class="partner-name">WITS University</div>
          <div class="partner-text">
            Official website of the University of the Witwatersrand.
          </div>
          <a href="https://www.wits.ac.za" target="_blank" class="contact-link" style="margin-top: 1rem; display: inline-block;">
            Visit →
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="partner-card">
           <img src="images/oldmutual.jpg" alt="Old Mutual Insure" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
          <div class="partner-name">Old Mutual South Africa</div>
          <div class="partner-text">
            Learn more about Old Mutual's insurance and financial services.
          </div>
          <a href="https://www.oldmutual.co.za" target="_blank" class="contact-link" style="margin-top: 1rem; display: inline-block;">
            Visit →
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="partner-card">
          <img src="images/rail.png" alt="RAIL Lab" style="width: 56px; height: 56px; object-fit: contain; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
          <div class="partner-name">RAIL Lab (WITS)</div>
          <div class="partner-text">
            The Robotics, AI & Learning Lab — a sister lab at WITS.
          </div>
          <a href="https://www.raillab.org" target="_blank" class="contact-link" style="margin-top: 1rem; display: inline-block;">
            Visit →
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Map placeholder -->
<div class="bg-light-section" style="padding: 4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="text-center">
      <h3 style="color: var(--color-navy) !important; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
        Find Us on Campus
      </h3>
      <p style="color: #666; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto 1.5rem; font-size: 0.95rem;">
        The Risk Lab is located in the School of Statistics and Actuarial Science,
        West Campus, University of the Witwatersrand, Johannesburg.
      </p>
      <iframe 
  src="https://www.openstreetmap.org/export/embed.html?bbox=28.024810%2C-26.192170%2C28.028810%2C-26.188170&amp;layer=mapnik&amp;marker=-26.190170%2C28.026810" 
  width="100%" 
  height="450" 
  style="border:0; border-radius: 12px; max-width: 800px; margin: 0 auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);">
</iframe>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
